notes: Elite Fourum community study, n=4628 packs (95% CI): V 14.20% (1/7.04), VMAX 2.20% (1/45.37), ultra rare 3.74% (1/26.75), rainbow rare 1.23% (1/81.19), secret rare 0.91% (1/110.19). Holo rare rate (1/5.5) from ThePriceDex community aggregate; residual mass on non-holo rare. All hits modeled in the rare slot; reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. ETB SWSH era = 8 packs.
